longBusinessSummary: Napatech A/S provides programmable smart network interface cards and data processing units solutions for cloud, enterprise, and telecom datacenter networks in the Americas and internationally. The company provides Link Capture Software that enables packet capture with nanosecond timestamping and replay with precise inter-frame gap control; Link Inline Software provides a processing architecture which offloads and accelerates flow aware application dataplanes; Link-Virtualization Software, offloads and accelerates the Open vSwitch data plane to enhance CPU efficiency and network performance; Link-Storage Software, a solution for storage and network offload, virtualized cloud, and cloud-native or bare-metal server virtualization; Link-Security Software, offloads the TLS protocol from the host CPU to an DPU while maintaining full software compatibility at the application level; and Link Programmable, which enables end users and OEMs to deploy FPGA computation solutions. It also provides capture products, including NT400D13, NT400D11, NT200A02, NT100A01, NT50B01, NT40A11, and N3070X SmartNIC; inline products, such as NT200A02 SmartNIC; and storage, security products, including F2070X DPU. In addition, the company offers solutions for 5G user plane function, cyber security, telecom, cloud and data centers, financial services, infrastructure and defense, network management, and virtualization. Napatech A/S was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.
